issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate tasks across pre-referral, post-referral, and sale pending workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the underlying association/filter problem.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the redundant tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper exit filters for these deal stages. A tweak was made to the workflow filters to suppress tasks for those statuses.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This was because 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include the Offer Accepted deal stage.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The issue was identified as a product-level problem rather than a workflow configuration issue. Luis resolved the issue directly.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reflect the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving their assigned tasks. HubSpot support was contacted and identified a fix. The root cause was not explicitly stated but appeared related to how MRC deals without a lender attached were being processed by the enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not generate TC tasks.
